name: HSBC Premier Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Waived for HSBC Premier banking customers

categoryRates.description: 10X Reward Points on travel and international spends
2 Reward Points per ₹100 on all other purchases

additionalBenefits: Unlimited lounge access worldwide via Priority Pass
Golf privileges at select courses worldwide
Airport meet and greet services at select airports
pros: Unlimited domestic and international lounge access
10X rewards on travel and international spends
Fee waived for HSBC Premier banking customers
cons: Requires HSBC Premier banking relationship for best value
HSBC has limited branch network in India
Point value at ₹0.50 is average for super-premium
idealFor: HSBC Premier customers looking for a super-premium travel card
High-net-worth individuals who travel internationally frequently

faqs.question: Do I need an HSBC Premier account?
faqs.answer: While not mandatory, HSBC Premier banking customers get the annual fee waived. The card is primarily targeted at Premier relationship holders.

faqs.question: How does unlimited lounge access work?
faqs.answer: You get a Priority Pass membership with unlimited visits to 1,300+ lounges worldwide for both you and your supplementary cardholder.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹10,000 annual fee is waived for HSBC Premier banking customers. For non-Premier customers, waiver terms may apply based on spend thresholds.

faqs.question: Can I use HSBC's global network?
faqs.answer: Yes, HSBC Premier customers can access banking services across 60+ countries, making it convenient for frequent international travellers.
